RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend.
